inputs.label: Total Floor Area
inputs.businessContext: Total available warehouse floor space in square feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total available warehouse floor space in square feet.

inputs.label: Storage Area Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total floor area dedicated to storage (pallet racks, shelving).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of total floor area dedicated to storage (pallet racks, shelving).

inputs.label: Aisle Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of main travel aisles in feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of main travel aisles in feet.

inputs.label: Pallet Flow Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of pallet storage system used.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of pallet storage system used.

inputs.label: Average Pallet Size (footprint)
inputs.businessContext: Average footprint of a single pallet (length x width).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average footprint of a single pallet (length x width).

inputs.label: Average Inventory Turns per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of times inventory is cycled annually.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of times inventory is cycled annually.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Fully loaded hourly wage for warehouse operators.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully loaded hourly wage for warehouse operators.

inputs.label: Equipment Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly cost of material handling equipment (forklifts, pallet jacks).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly cost of material handling equipment (forklifts, pallet jacks).

inputs.label: Order Lines per Day
inputs.businessContext: Average number of order lines processed daily.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of order lines processed daily.

inputs.label: Storage Utilization Rate
inputs.businessContext: Current percentage of storage positions occupied.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current percentage of storage positions occupied.

inputs.label: Layout Type
inputs.businessContext: Warehouse layout configuration based on aisle width and equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Warehouse layout configuration based on aisle width and equipment.

inputs.label: Include Cross-Dock Area
inputs.businessContext: Whether a dedicated cross-docking zone is included in the layout.

businessContext_i18n.en: Whether a dedicated cross-docking zone is included in the layout.

rules.message: Storage area must not exceed total floor area.
Aisle width inconsistent with selected layout type.
Utilization and turns must be within realistic ranges.

thresholds.message: Storage utilization below 70% indicates wasted space.
Utilization above 95% may cause congestion and safety risks.
Low inventory turns suggest overstocking or slow movers.

formulas.label: Estimated Pallet Positions
formulas.description: Number of pallet positions based on storage area and aisle overhead factor.

formulas.label: Daily Throughput (pallets moved)
formulas.description: Estimated pallet moves per day (60% of order lines involve pallet handling).

formulas.label: Travel Distance Factor
formulas.expression: case layout_type when 'conventional' then 1.0 when 'narrow_aisle' then 0.85 when 'very_narrow_aisle' then 0.7 when 'automated' then 0.5 else 1.0 end
formulas.description: Factor reducing travel distance based on layout efficiency.

formulas.label: Labor Cost per Pallet Moved
formulas.description: Cost to move one pallet considering labor, equipment, and travel efficiency.

formulas.label: Annual Operating Cost (storage & handling)
formulas.description: Total annual cost for pallet movement and storage operations.

primary.label: Total Annual Operating Cost
primary.description: Primary result: total annual warehouse operating cost.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Excess Aisle Space
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Aisle width greater than necessary for layout type increases travel time and reduces storage density.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Low Storage Utilization
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Underutilized positions increase cost per pallet stored.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Inefficient Pallet Flow Type
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Flow type mismatch with inventory turns leads to extra handling.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Labor/Equipment Cost Imbalance
hiddenLossDrivers.description: High labor cost relative to equipment may indicate automation opportunity.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Aisle Width
suggestedActions.description: If layout type allows, narrow aisles to increase storage density and reduce travel time.
suggestedActions.expectedImprovement: 10-20% reduction in labor cost per pallet

suggestedActions.label: Increase Storage Utilization
suggestedActions.description: Reorganize slow movers and consolidate space to raise utilization above 85%.
suggestedActions.expectedImprovement: 5-15% reduction in effective cost per pallet

suggestedActions.label: Adopt Automation for High Throughput
suggestedActions.description: If daily throughput > 3000 pallets, consider automated storage and retrieval systems (AS/RS).

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Cross-Dock Flow
suggestedActions.description: If cross-dock area is included, ensure it is positioned near shipping/receiving to minimize travel.
